Gourmet Donuts · All Day
Gourmet Donut — Custard
House-made fried donut filled with vanilla custard, dusted with icing sugar
FJD$8
Price
1×
Portions
5 min
Prep
3 min
Cook
All Day
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Dough
Donut dough, proofed and portionedeach1
Filling
Vanilla custardg50
Finish
Icing sugarg5.0
Method
1
Deep fry proofed donut at 175°C for 1.5 min each side until golden.
2
Drain on paper. Cool 2 min — not too long or difficult to fill.
3
Fill with vanilla custard using piping bag and fine nozzle.
4
Dust generously with icing sugar. Serve immediately.
Plating Notes
Dust visible on top. Serve on board or in paper bag. Eat fresh.
Equipment
Deep fryer · Piping bag · Fine nozzle · Sieve
Allergens
GLUTEN DAIRY EGGS
TREE NUTS PEANUTS SHELLFISH FISH SOY SESAME CELERY MUSTARD LUPIN MOLLUSCS SULPHITES
